name: world_edit
description: WorldEdit-style wand selection, copy/paste, fills, and undo history with full block state preservation
globals: (function() { return { selections: {}, wandKey: 'world_edit_wand', wandValue: 'true', undo: {}, redo: {}, clipboard: {} }; })

commands.label: wand
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); player.giveTaggedItem('BLAZE_ROD', 1, '&aWorldEdit Wand', state.wandKey, state.wandValue); player.sendMessage('&aYou received the WorldEdit wand. Left-click for Pos1, right-click for Pos2.'); })

commands.label: pos1
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var loc = player.getLocation(); var target = { x: Math.floor(loc.getX()), y: Math.floor(loc.getY()) - 1, z: Math.floor(loc.getZ()), world: loc.getWorld().getName() }; var id = player.getId(); if (!state.selections[id]) state.selections[id] = {}; state.selections[id].pos1 = target; player.sendMessage('&aPos1 set to &f' + target.x + ', ' + target.y + ', ' + target.z + '&a.'); })

commands.label: pos2
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var loc = player.getLocation(); var target = { x: Math.floor(loc.getX()), y: Math.floor(loc.getY()) - 1, z: Math.floor(loc.getZ()), world: loc.getWorld().getName() }; var id = player.getId(); if (!state.selections[id]) state.selections[id] = {}; state.selections[id].pos2 = target; player.sendMessage('&aPos2 set to &f' + target.x + ', ' + target.y + ', ' + target.z + '&a.'); })

commands.label: region_info
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { player.sendMessage('&cSelect both points first.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYour points must be in the same world.'); return; } var minX = Math.min(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var maxX = Math.max(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var minY = Math.min(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var maxY = Math.max(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var minZ = Math.min(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var maxZ = Math.max(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var volume = (maxX - minX + 1) * (maxY - minY + 1) * (maxZ - minZ + 1); player.sendMessage('&eSelection: &f' + minX + ', ' + minY + ', ' + minZ + ' &7to &f' + maxX + ', ' + maxY + ', ' + maxZ); player.sendMessage('&eVolume: &f' + volume + ' &eblocks.'); })

commands.label: set_block
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); var material = args.length > 0 ? String(args[0]).toUpperCase() : ''; if (!material) { player.sendMessage('&cUsage: /set_block <MATERIAL>'); return; } var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { player.sendMessage('&cSelect both points first.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYour points must be in the same world.'); return; } var world = player.getWorld(); if (world.getName() !== sel.pos1.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYou must be in the same world as your selection.'); return; } var minX = Math.min(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var maxX = Math.max(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var minY = Math.min(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var maxY = Math.max(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var minZ = Math.min(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var maxZ = Math.max(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var changes = []; for (var x = minX; x <= maxX; x++) { for (var y = minY; y <= maxY; y++) { for (var z = minZ; z <= maxZ; z++) { var b = world.getBlockAt(x, y, z); changes.push({ x: x, y: y, z: z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); b.setType(material); } } } var id = player.getId(); if (!state.undo[id]) state.undo[id] = []; if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.undo[id].push({ changes: changes }); state.redo[id] = []; player.sendMessage('&aFilled selection with &f' + material + '&a. Undo available with /undo_last.'); })

commands.label: sphere
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); if (args.length < 2) { player.sendMessage('&cUsage: /sphere <MATERIAL> <RADIUS>'); return; } var material = String(args[0]).toUpperCase(); var radius = parseInt(args[1], 10); if (isNaN(radius) || radius < 1 || radius > 32) { player.sendMessage('&cRadius must be between 1 and 32.'); return; } var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { player.sendMessage('&cSelect both points first.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYour points must be in the same world.'); return; } var world = player.getWorld(); if (world.getName() !== sel.pos1.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYou must be in the same world as your selection.'); return; } var cx = Math.floor((sel.pos1.x + sel.pos2.x) / 2); var cy = Math.floor((sel.pos1.y + sel.pos2.y) / 2); var cz = Math.floor((sel.pos1.z + sel.pos2.z) / 2); var r2 = radius * radius; var changes = []; for (var x = cx - radius; x <= cx + radius; x++) { for (var y = cy - radius; y <= cy + radius; y++) { for (var z = cz - radius; z <= cz + radius; z++) { var dx = x - cx, dy = y - cy, dz = z - cz; if (dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz <= r2) { var b = world.getBlockAt(x, y, z); changes.push({ x: x, y: y, z: z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); b.setType(material); } } } } var id = player.getId(); if (!state.undo[id]) state.undo[id] = []; if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.undo[id].push({ changes: changes }); state.redo[id] = []; player.sendMessage('&aCreated sphere of &f' + material + '&a. Undo available with /undo_last.'); })

commands.label: copy
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { player.sendMessage('&cSelect both points first.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYour points must be in the same world.'); return; } var world = player.getWorld(); if (world.getName() !== sel.pos1.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYou must be in the same world as your selection.'); return; } var minX = Math.min(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var maxX = Math.max(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var minY = Math.min(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var maxY = Math.max(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var minZ = Math.min(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var maxZ = Math.max(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var blocks = []; for (var x = minX; x <= maxX; x++) { for (var y = minY; y <= maxY; y++) { for (var z = minZ; z <= maxZ; z++) { var b = world.getBlockAt(x, y, z); blocks.push({ dx: x - minX, dy: y - minY, dz: z - minZ, snapshot: b.captureState() }); } } } state.clipboard[player.getId()] = { world: world.getName(), width: maxX - minX + 1, height: maxY - minY + 1, depth: maxZ - minZ + 1, blocks: blocks }; player.sendMessage('&aCopied selection to clipboard. Use /paste to place it.'); })

commands.label: paste
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var clip = state.clipboard[player.getId()]; if (!clip || !clip.blocks || clip.blocks.length === 0) { player.sendMessage('&cYour clipboard is empty. Use /copy first.'); return; } var world = player.getWorld(); var base = player.getLocation(); var bx = Math.floor(base.getX()); var by = Math.floor(base.getY()); var bz = Math.floor(base.getZ()); var changes = []; for (var i = 0; i < clip.blocks.length; i++) { var c = clip.blocks[i]; var x = bx + c.dx; var y = by + c.dy; var z = bz + c.dz; var b = world.getBlockAt(x, y, z); changes.push({ x: x, y: y, z: z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); b.restoreState(c.snapshot); } var id = player.getId(); if (!state.undo[id]) state.undo[id] = []; if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.undo[id].push({ changes: changes }); state.redo[id] = []; player.sendMessage('&aPasted clipboard at your feet. Undo available with /undo_last.'); })

commands.label: eval
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); if (args.length < 2) { player.sendMessage('&cUsage: /eval <MATERIAL> <EXPRESSION...>'); player.sendMessage('&7Expression variables: x, y, z, minX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ, cx, cy, cz'); player.sendMessage('&7Return 1 to place a block, 0 to leave empty.'); return; } var material = String(args[0]).toUpperCase(); var expr = args.slice(1).join(' '); var sel = state.selections[player.getId()]; if (!sel || !sel.pos1 || !sel.pos2) { player.sendMessage('&cSelect both points first.'); return; } if (sel.pos1.world !== sel.pos2.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYour points must be in the same world.'); return; } var world = player.getWorld(); if (world.getName() !== sel.pos1.world) { player.sendMessage('&cYou must be in the same world as your selection.'); return; } var minX = Math.min(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var maxX = Math.max(sel.pos1.x, sel.pos2.x); var minY = Math.min(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var maxY = Math.max(sel.pos1.y, sel.pos2.y); var minZ = Math.min(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var maxZ = Math.max(sel.pos1.z, sel.pos2.z); var cx = (minX + maxX) / 2; var cy = (minY + maxY) / 2; var cz = (minZ + maxZ) / 2; var fn; try { fn = new Function('x', 'y', 'z', 'minX', 'minY', 'minZ', 'maxX', 'maxY', 'maxZ', 'cx', 'cy', 'cz', 'return (' + expr + ');'); } catch (e) { player.sendMessage('&cInvalid expression.'); return; } var changes = []; var placed = 0; for (var x = minX; x <= maxX; x++) { for (var y = minY; y <= maxY; y++) { for (var z = minZ; z <= maxZ; z++) { var value; try { value = fn(x, y, z, minX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ, cx, cy, cz); } catch (e) { player.sendMessage('&cError while evaluating expression.'); return; } if (value === 1) { var b = world.getBlockAt(x, y, z); changes.push({ x: x, y: y, z: z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); b.setType(material); placed++; } } } } var id = player.getId(); if (!state.undo[id]) state.undo[id] = []; if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.undo[id].push({ changes: changes }); state.redo[id] = []; player.sendMessage('&aEvaluated expression and placed &f' + placed + '&a blocks of &f' + material + '&a.'); })

commands.label: undo_last
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var id = player.getId(); var stack = state.undo && state.undo[id]; if (!stack || stack.length === 0) { player.sendMessage('&cNothing to undo.'); return; } var entry = stack.pop(); var changes = entry.changes || []; var redoChanges = []; for (var i = changes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var c = changes[i]; var world = player.getWorld(); var b = world.getBlockAt(c.x, c.y, c.z); redoChanges.push({ x: c.x, y: c.y, z: c.z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.restore) { c.snapshot.restore(); } else if (b.restoreState) { b.restoreState(c.snapshot); } else if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.getBlockData) { b.setBlockData(c.snapshot.getBlockData()); } } if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.redo[id].push({ changes: redoChanges }); player.sendMessage('&aLast edit undone. Use /redo to reapply it.'); if (stack.length > 0) { player.sendMessage('&7Undo history remaining: &f' + stack.length + '&7.'); } })

commands.label: redo
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var id = player.getId(); var stack = state.redo && state.redo[id]; if (!stack || stack.length === 0) { player.sendMessage('&cNothing to redo.'); return; } var entry = stack.pop(); var changes = entry.changes || []; var undoChanges = []; for (var i = 0; i < changes.length; i++) { var c = changes[i]; var world = player.getWorld(); var b = world.getBlockAt(c.x, c.y, c.z); undoChanges.push({ x: c.x, y: c.y, z: c.z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.restore) { c.snapshot.restore(); } else if (b.restoreState) { b.restoreState(c.snapshot); } else if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.getBlockData) { b.setBlockData(c.snapshot.getBlockData()); } } if (!state.undo[id]) state.undo[id] = []; state.undo[id].push({ changes: undoChanges }); player.sendMessage('&aLast undone edit reapplied.'); if (stack.length > 0) { player.sendMessage('&7Redo history remaining: &f' + stack.length + '&7.'); } })

commands.label: clear_selection
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); delete state.selections[player.getId()]; player.sendMessage('&aSelection cleared.'); })

commands.label: undo
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var id = player.getId(); var stack = state.undo && state.undo[id]; if (!stack || stack.length === 0) { player.sendMessage('&cNothing to undo.'); return; } var entry = stack.pop(); var redoChanges = []; for (var i = 0; i < entry.changes.length; i++) { var c = entry.changes[i]; var world = player.getWorld(); var b = world.getBlockAt(c.x, c.y, c.z); redoChanges.push({ x: c.x, y: c.y, z: c.z, snapshot: b.captureState() }); if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.restore) { c.snapshot.restore(); } else if (b.restoreState) { b.restoreState(c.snapshot); } else if (c.snapshot && c.snapshot.getBlockData) { b.setBlockData(c.snapshot.getBlockData()); } } if (!state.redo[id]) state.redo[id] = []; state.redo[id].push({ changes: redoChanges }); player.sendMessage('&aUndid last edit. Use /redo to reapply it.'); })

events.code: (function(ctx, state) { if (!ctx.isMainHand()) return; var player = ctx.getPlayer(); var item = player.getItemInMainHand(); if (!item || item.isEmpty() || !item.dataEquals(state.wandKey, state.wandValue)) return; var block = ctx.getBlock(); if (!block || block.isAir()) { player.sendMessage('&cAim at a block to select a point.'); return; } var id = player.getId(); if (!state.selections[id]) state.selections[id] = {}; var action = ctx.getAction(); var point = { x: block.getX(), y: block.getY(), z: block.getZ(), world: block.getWorld().getName() }; if (action === 'LEFT_CLICK_BLOCK') { state.selections[id].pos1 = point; player.sendMessage('&aPos1 set to &f' + point.x + ', ' + point.y + ', ' + point.z + '&a.'); ctx.setCancelled(true); return; } if (action === 'RIGHT_CLICK_BLOCK') { state.selections[id].pos2 = point; player.sendMessage('&aPos2 set to &f' + point.x + ', ' + point.y + ', ' + point.z + '&a.'); ctx.setCancelled(true); return; } })
